headline: Is Recent Regulatory And Infrastructure Progress Altering The Investment Case For American Water Works Company (AWK)?
summary: In recent days, American Water Works Company has reported multiple regulatory settlements, infrastructure upgrades, and community programs, including revenue-supportive rate agreements in California and Virginia and completion of a major main replacement project in California. Taken together, these developments underline how American Water Works Company is reinforcing its regulated revenue base while investing in long-term system resilience and workforce development. Next, we’ll explore how...
